selectOption.normal: Please select your class for this course
selectOption.event: Please select the option which you are applying for

selectTimeSlot.normal: Select the first lesson for the class you are going to apply for
selectTimeSlot.event: Select the time slot of the event which you are applying for
selectTimeSlot.recurring: Select the time slot when you want to start your class
selectTimeSlot.fixedSchedule: Choose the same time slot(s) every week
selectTimeSlot.noTimeSlots: Please select a date in the calendar to show available time slots
selectTimeSlot.thisDateHasNoTimeSlots: This date has no available time slots

pickPeriodStep.timeExplain: , displayed in 12 hour am / pm format
pickPeriodStep.noClasses: The educator has not set up any classes for recruitment yet.
pickPeriodStep.noSessions: The educator has not set up any sessions for recruitment yet.
pickPeriodStep.noPhases: The educator has not set up any class timeslots for recruitment yet.
pickPeriodStep.noCurrentPhases: Sorry, all the time slots of the option has started. Please contact the educator for more information.
pickPeriodStep.noCurrentSessions: Sorry, all the sessions of the event has started. Please contact the educator for more information.
pickPeriodStep.periodRemind: By applying for this event, you will have access to all the time slots included

pickTimeslotStep.pickDate: Pick date and time for your first lesson
pickTimeslotStep.sessionRemind: By purchasing this session, you will have access to all the timeslot included

pickSubscriptionPlanStep.buyPlanRemind: When you purchase our subscription product, you will be billed

pickPriceOptionStep.title: Price Options
pickPriceOptionStep.description: Please select the price option you want to apply for
pickPriceOptionStep.insufficientLessonsWithinPeriod: Not enough lessons within the application period. Please pick another package.

customFieldStep.fillDetail: Please fill in the following information to complete the application
customFieldStep.specialStudy: Special study (please indicate if we could offer you extra help)

title.normal: You will review the information, payment details, and the time slots on the next step
title.event: You will review the information, payment details, and the time slots on the next step

customFieldStep.createAnAccount: Send application information to this applicant through email?
customFieldStep.pleaseValidateForm: Form submission failed. Please fill in all required fields.

confirmDetailStep.specificT&C: Please read the terms and conditions before confirming your application

pickTuitionStep.confirmDetail: You can confirm the detail of each lesson on next step
pickTuitionStep.recurTuitionReminder: The educator may have set some dates as unavailable. Therefore, some of the lessons may be delayed until the next week.

pickWorkshopFeeStep.confirmDetail: You can confirm the detail of each session on next step

payment.title: Payment
payment.name: Your full name (for validating your application)
payment.phone: Phone number (for the educator to contact you)
payment.success: Your application is successful. An email will be sent to you soon.
payment.waitingPayment: You have submitted the application form. Please complete the payment to confirm your application.
payment.failure: Your application failed. Please contact the educator directly.
payment.incomplete: You have not completed all the steps. Please go back and select your class, date and time, and tuition option.
payment.notChanged: You will not be charged yet. Please enter your payment details in the new window after proceeding.

autoFillForm.title: Auto-fill application form
autoFillForm.description: Please verify your information used in the previous application. We will retrieve your information securely.
autoFillForm.name: Full name
autoFillForm.bookingFound: Previous application found. We will fill the appropriate fields with your previous information.
autoFillForm.noRecordFound: No previous application found. Please fill in the form manually.
autoFillForm.pleaseCheckCredentials: Please check your credentials and try again.

paymentDetail.title: Payment Detail
paymentDetail.enrollToSeeDetail: Payment details will be shown after registration.
paymentDetail.error: Error in getting payment detail, please try again later.
paymentDetail.paymentGuide: Details of the payment method will be shown after you click 'Proceed'. Here are the instructions:
paymentDetail.scanPaymentImage: Check the payment instructions and account number on the next page.
paymentDetail.enterPaymentLink: Pay according to the instructions. Save any receipt or payment proof.
paymentDetail.transferMoney: Upload the relevant payment proof. Our staff will verify the payment and confirm your application.
paymentDetail.choosePaymentMethod: Please select a payment method from the options below

successPayment.confirmEmail: An confirmation E-mail and receipt has been sent to your email
successPayment.followInstruction: Follow the instruction in the E-mail and enjoy your lesson!

qrCode.showAtCounter: Please show this QR code at the counter
qrCode.tapQrCode: Tap the QR code to enlarge it

uploadReceipt.paymentReceipt: Please upload the payment receipt image to complete your application
uploadReceipt.uploadHint: Please complete the payment to secure the seat.
uploadReceipt.applicationApproved: Your application and payment has been approved
uploadReceipt.uploadSuccess: Your payment proof has been uploaded successfully.
uploadReceipt.uploadSuccessToast: Your payment proof has been uploaded successfully.
uploadReceipt.waitConfirm: Please wait for the institution to confirm your payment.
uploadReceipt.tokenExpired: The payment page has expired. Please apply again to obtain a new payment page.

receiptStatus.waiting: Please select whether to pay by online payment or offline payment to complete the registration.
receiptStatus.disapproved: The receipt you uploaded earlier is disapproved by the educator. Please pay again.
receiptStatus.approved: The application has been approved. The payment has been completed.
receiptStatus.applied: You have submitted the proof. Please wait for the institution to confirm your application.
receiptStatus.resubmit: The application has been approved. The payment has been completed. You can still submit additional payment proof if needed.
receiptStatus.noInvoices: No invoices found for your application

workshop.pickSession: Pick your session for this event

coupon.expired: The coupon is invalid or expired
coupon.canUse: The price is not final yet. You can use coupons and discounts in the next stage.

trialLesson.title: Trial Lesson
trialLesson.alreadyEnrolled: The applicant is already enrolled in this class lesson!
trialLesson.usedTitleAlert: You have already registered in this class before.
trialLesson.usedDescriptionAlert: You are not eligible for this trial class option.

wishlist.failed: Some applications have failed. Please try again.
wishlist.applicationSuccessful: All your course applications have been successfully submitted.
wishlist.confirmationEmail: You will receive a confirmation email shortly with further details.

refillConfirm.title: You want to refill the form?
refillConfirm.description: You have already filled in the form. Do you want to refill the form?
